title: Thyroid Antibodies: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
had thyroid disease and are pregnant, you may be tested for thyroid antibodies along with tests that measure thyroid hormones. Medicines to treat thyroid disease are safe to take during pregnancy .
References
